steps.title: Show why the Act mattered
steps.content: The student wants the significance of the Hart-Celler Act for an unfamiliar audience. That requires explaining not only what the Act did but also what kind of system it ended.

steps.title: Include the biased system
steps.content: Choice A gives one quota detail without the Act's effect. Choice B explains the old formula but not the Act. Choice C says the system was abolished but not why that mattered. The strongest sentence says the Act abolished a system favoring northern Europe. The answer is D.
